sourceMovie.title: Safe House
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Safe House (2012) as a action theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The action and thriller blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Jason Bourne
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Safe House clicked for you, Jason Bourne (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and thriller, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Safe House?
faq.answer: Try Jason Bourne, Salt, The Expendables 3—each shares DNA with Safe House while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Safe House?
faq.answer: Safe House (2012) is best described as Action, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Safe House worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.5/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
